title: Howd@vah #1937
definition:
Hodevah = "praise of Jehovah"

 1) the head of a Levitical family returning from Exile in the time
    of Nehemiah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Hodevah = "praise of Jehovah"

 1) the head of a Levitical family returning from Exile in the time
    of Nehemiah

    NASB:  a Levitical family
